cases.title: TS-24: GPS disabled or permission denied on check-in submit returns GpsDisabled with Vietnamese recovery message
preconditions: Active session with valid unexpired QrToken per testing-plan §3 TS-24
Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie
Request body omits latitude/longitude simulating client GPS unavailable after permission denial
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per AC-08c and error-handling §4.4
Assert errorCode GpsDisabled preserved in English for client logic
Verify no Present attendance created; student may retry after enabling GPS per BR-12
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-24 row covered: GPS disabled/permission denied surfaces GpsDisabled with Vietnamese recovery copy per NFR-19 and AC-08c

cases.title: CheckInService.submit with missing coordinates returns GpsDisabled and leaves Pending attendance for recovery retry
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running via Compose
Active session with enrolled student Pending attendance and Valid qr_tokens row
CheckInService wired to AttendanceService and check_in_attempts repository
locationPayload omits latitude and longitude (GPS unavailable per BR-12)
steps: Record beforeState: attendance status Pending, qr_token status Valid
Invoke CheckInService.submit(tokenId, locationPayloadWithoutCoords, studentId)
Assert returned outcome GpsDisabled without unhandled exception
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending (afterState unchanged)
Query check_in_attempts and assert row inserted with outcome GpsDisabled
Query qr_tokens and assert token status remains Valid (not Consumed)
cases.expected: NFR-19 module boundary: GpsDisabled rejection preserves retry path — Pending attendance and Valid token remain so student can recover after granting GPS per BR-12 and ui-states §4.2

cases.title: Permission guide content catalog resolves platform-specific Vietnamese steps for camera and GPS types
preconditions: Message catalog or PermissionGuideModal content module exported with locale vi-VN
Content keys defined for type camera|gps and platform ios|android per common-ui-components §5.2
Production quality bar §3 requires permission-denied modals with platform-specific Vietnamese instructions
steps: Resolve permission guide content for type camera and platform ios; assert non-empty Vietnamese numbered steps
Resolve permission guide content for type camera and platform android; assert steps differ from ios variant
Resolve permission guide content for type gps and platform ios; assert non-empty Vietnamese steps referencing location settings
Resolve permission guide content for type gps and platform android; assert steps differ from ios variant
Assert no content block is English-only or empty stub per NFR-17 localization bar
cases.expected: NFR-19 content module: clear Vietnamese platform-specific instructions available for both camera and GPS denial flows per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4 NFR-19 target

cases.title: GpsDisabled check-in attempt leaves Attendance Pending enabling post-permission retry
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled studentId and Active sessionId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid
Student previously denied GPS permission on client
steps: Record beforeState Attendance Pending from database
Submit check-in without coordinates via CheckInService or POST /check-in
Assert outcome GpsDisabled and CheckInAttempt logged
Query attendance_records and assert afterState remains Pending
Simulate client retry with valid in-radius coordinates after permission grant
Assert second submit succeeds with afterState Present when other rules pass
cases.expected: beforeState Pending; afterState Pending on GpsDisabled; NFR-19 recovery path allows successful retry after student enables GPS per ui-states §4.2 and user-flows §3 GpsDisabled row

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in without GPS coordinates returns 400 GpsDisabled envelope with actionable Vietnamese message

Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and student Pending attendance
Request body includes tokenId only; latitude and longitude omitted

Assert response body outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per error-handling §4.4
Assert message is Vietnamese user-facing text suitable for CheckInOutcomePanel display with recovery CTA
cases.expected: HTTP 400 GpsDisabled contract per API design §6.3; server-side recovery message in Vietnamese per NFR-19 error clarity dimension and AC-08c

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in with gpsAvailable false client flag returns 400 GpsDisabled before radius evaluation

cases.title: GPS permission denied on GpsCaptureStep shows GpsDisabled outcome with Hướng dẫn cấp quyền CTA

Verify role alert on blocking error per accessibility-basics §6
